<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaltier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]][[de:Metall-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de métal]][[hak:Kâng-yìm]][[ja:庚寅]][[ko:경인]][[nds:Metall-Tiger]][[vi:Canh Dần]][[za:Gengyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]][[zh-yue:庚寅]][[zh:庚寅]]

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yin Earth Ox]] and the following combination is [[Yin Metal Rabbit]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kinoe (甲)]] represents yang [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]] and the [[Earthly Branches]] element [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger (寅)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

==Years of Yang Metal Tiger==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 30 when divided by 60 is a year of Kōgo.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kōgo'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 34|34 AD]]
* [[AD 94|94 AD]]
* [[154|154 AD]]
* [[214|214 AD]]
* [[274|274 AD]]
* [[334|334 AD]]
* [[394|394 AD]]
* [[454|454 AD]]
* [[514|514 AD]]
* [[574|574 AD]]
* [[634|634 AD]]
* [[694|694 AD]]
* [[754|754 AD]]
* [[814|814 AD]]
* [[874|874 AD]]
* [[934|934 AD]]
* [[994|994 AD]]
|
* [[1054|1054 AD]]
* [[1114|1114 AD]]
* [[1174|1174 AD]]
* [[1234|1234 AD]]
* [[1294|1294 AD]]
* [[1354|1354 AD]]
* [[1414|1414 AD]]
* [[1474|1474 AD]]
* [[1534|1534 AD]]
* [[1594|1594 AD]]
* [[1654|1654 AD]]
* [[1714|1714 AD]]
* [[1774|1774 AD]]
* [[1834|1834 AD]]
* [[1894|1894 AD]]
* [[1954|1954 AD]]
|
* [[2014|2014 AD]]
* [[2074 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2134 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2194 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2254 AD]]
* [[24th century|2314 AD]]
* [[2374 AD]]
* [[2434 AD]]
* [[2494 AD]]
* [[2554 AD]]
* [[2614 AD]]
* [[2674 AD]]
* [[2734 AD]]
* [[2794 AD]]
* [[2854 AD]]
* [[2914 AD]]
* [[2974 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of [[Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of [[Ten directions]].
== See Also ==

<!--Yang Metal Tiger--><!--Yang Metal Tiger-->

{{wikidata link|Q1063199}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
